summary: Iteration 27: Basketball Pipeline Fixes Verified. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - Soccer/Basketball toggle works correctly, subtitle changes to 'NBA' when Basketball selected. Key fixes verified: NBA-filtered team search (league=12), player game logs with sampleSize > 5, recentSamples with real game data, dataQuality.level, rebounds parsing fixed, steals/blocks/turnovers removed from BASKETBALL_PROP_TYPES.
passed_tests: POST /api/basketball/search-teams for 'Suns' returns Phoenix Suns (NOT youth/foreign teams like 'Helios Suns mladi')
POST /api/basketball/predict for Jalen Green Points returns playerGameLogs.sampleSize > 5
POST /api/basketball/predict returns recentSamples array with date/opponent/value
POST /api/basketball/predict for Devin Booker returns valid game logs
POST /api/basketball/predict for rebounds prop type works (fixed dict.total parsing)
POST /api/predict (soccer) still works - regression test passed
Frontend BASKETBALL_PROP_TYPES does NOT contain steals/blocks/turnovers
Frontend: Soccer/Basketball toggle visible in header
Frontend: Basketball button activates correctly when clicked
Frontend: Subtitle changes to 'Upload a NBA prop screenshot for instant AI analysis' when Basketball selected
critical_code_review_comments: basketball_utils.py: search_nba_teams() correctly uses league=12 filter to return only NBA teams
basketball_utils.py: get_player_season_stats() uses single API call for ALL season stats (key optimization)
basketball_utils.py: parse_player_stat() correctly handles rebounds as dict with 'total' key
basketball_predict.py: build_player_game_logs() properly fetches player stats via player ID lookup
basketball_predict.py: Multi-AI consensus engine (5 AIs) with first-3-wins pattern working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Basketball pipeline fixes verified. Key changes: 1) Team search now uses league=12 filter for NBA-only results, 2) Player ID lookup via /players endpoint before fetching stats, 3) Single API call for all season stats via games/statistics/players?player=ID&season=SEASON, 4) Rebounds parsing fixed (dict with 'total' key), 5) steals/blocks/turnovers removed from prop types. Test teams: Phoenix Suns (ID: 155), Memphis Grizzlies (ID: 146). Basketball prediction takes ~30-60 seconds due to multi-AI consensus.

nba_filtered_team_search.issue: Team search returned wrong teams (e.g., 'Helios Suns mladi' instead of 'Phoenix Suns')
nba_filtered_team_search.fix: Added league=12 filter to search_nba_teams() in basketball_utils.py

player_game_logs.fix: Player ID lookup via /players endpoint, then single-call season stats via games/statistics/players?player=ID&season=SEASON

rebounds_parsing.issue: Rebounds returned 0 due to incorrect parsing
rebounds_parsing.fix: Fixed parse_player_stat() to handle rebounds as dict with 'total' key

removed_unavailable_props.issue: steals/blocks/turnovers not available in per-player API
removed_unavailable_props.fix: Removed from VALID_BASKETBALL_PROPS in scan.py and BASKETBALL_PROP_TYPES in App.js
